expectations.text: package.json includes sharp as a dependency
deck.on('rotate') handler is present for encoder rotation
osascript is used to get or set system volume
expectations.evidence: getVolume() calls execFileSync('osascript', ['-e', 'output volume of (get volume settings)']); setVolume() calls execFileSync with 'set volume output volume'

expectations.text: Rotation is debounced or throttled to avoid flooding osascript calls
expectations.evidence: clearTimeout(volumeTimer); volumeTimer = setTimeout(async () => { setVolume(pendingVolume) ... }, 100) — 100ms debounce at line 154

expectations.text: Encoder press (deck.on 'down' with encoder type) toggles mute
expectations.evidence: deck.on('down', async (control) => { if (control.type !== 'encoder') return; ... setMuted(currentMuted) }) at line 174

expectations.text: fillLcd or equivalent is called to update the LCD strip
expectations.evidence: deck.fillLcd(0, lcdBuf, { format: 'rgb', width: 800, height: 100 }) called in render() at line 124

expectations.text: Volume percentage is shown on the LCD display
expectations.evidence: renderLcd() SVG includes labelText = muted ? 'MUTED' : '${volume}%' rendered as a bold text element at x=w/2
